title: Un giorno nella vita
writer: Alessandro Blasetti, Mario Chiari, Diego Fabbri
actors: Elisa Cegani, Massimo Girotti, Mariella Lotti
plot: Some Italian partisans want to take refuge in a convent to escape German raids. The nuns are a little perplexed at first but then agree since one of the men is seriously wounded. When the partisans eventually leave, the Germans ta...
